'''Churba''' was the cosmopolitan [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Churba sector/Legends|Churba sector]], known for its cutting-edge technology. It was headquarters of [[Sencil Corporation]].

Within the first 20 years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], an old [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|dreadnaught]] was left in the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] orbit serving as a [[Museum/Legends|museum]] until, sometime prior to [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sent deep-space [[Tug/Legends|tugs]] that stole the ship from orbit and transferred to a secret location; it was repurposed and renamed the ''[[New Hope]]'' as a move of psychological warfare.

The [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Kirtan Loor]] and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Dar Keyis]] were from the planet.

[[Tetengo Noor]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] military, was also from Churba.

{{Planet-stub}}
